sys_script_include.description:
Taking a User, find the default OU for the user. This is used anywhere the system is trying to set the default OU. Putting it in a script include will make a switch from finding the highest OU for a member to finding the "Default OU" for a member if we choose to make that switch.
2.7 STRY0104389 - There is an error in the DIA log related to the function - GetUserDefaultOU - org.mozilla.javascript.EcmaError: The undefined value has no properties. STRY0059849 - OU Roles - OU Hierarchy Administrator
sys_script_include.name: OrganizationalScripts
